last_debrief: Vocab blitz on M47 payload. Comfortable: கேட்பேன், கேன்சல், நேரம் இருக்கா?. Struggled cold production on: ஃப்ரீ-யா?, தூக்கு, வை, நிஜமா?, கேட்குறேன், போஸ்ட்போன். Andrew notes the issue is boredom/over-rotation, not unfamiliarity — he has heard the sounds. System needs to push more new words, not over-drill the same struggled set.
status: 8 episodes under-listened (~22 min). Re-listen playlist recommended before new production.
